summary: Frontend testing completed for Trust Section with 3 rows (Metrics, Why Us/Philosophy, Rotating Quote). All features working correctly. Homepage displays all 3 rows with proper content. Admin editor loads default philosophy cards when DB has none, metrics description field is present and editable.
seed_data_creation: None required - uses DEFAULT_CARDS and DEFAULT_PHILO fallbacks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Section is fully functional with 3 rows. Admin editor at Homepage > TrustSection row > 'Edit Section Content' correctly loads defaults when DB has no saved data.

features_tested.feature: Homepage Trust Section displays Row 1 (Metrics) with icons, values, labels, AND descriptions
features_tested.details: 4 metric cards displayed: 5.0 Google Rating, 97% Stay With Us, 100% Deeply Trusted, 100% Love & Healing Driven - all with descriptions visible

features_tested.feature: Homepage Trust Section displays Row 2 (Why Us/Philosophy) with 5 cards
features_tested.details: 5 philosophy cards displayed with icons, titles, descriptions: A Soulful Home Like No Other, Ancient Wisdom Living Legacy, Healing at the Deepest Level, Effortless Transformation, Choose Us Choose You

features_tested.feature: Homepage Trust Section displays Row 3 (rotating testimonial quote with dot navigation)
features_tested.details: Quote section found with 3 navigation dots. Quote text rotates automatically and dots are clickable.

features_tested.feature: Admin panel Homepage > Trust section editor: Metrics Row shows all cards with value, label, description fields and style controls
features_tested.details: Metrics Row (4) editor visible with Value input, Label input, Description textarea, and StyleCell controls for each field

features_tested.feature: Admin panel Homepage > Trust section editor: Why Us Row loads 5 default cards when no saved data exists
features_tested.details: Why Us Row (5) shows default cards from DEFAULT_PHILO with titles like 'A Soulful Home Like No Other', 'Ancient Wisdom, Living Legacy', etc.

features_tested.feature: Admin panel Homepage > Trust section editor: Section Display checkboxes (Show Title, Show Subtitle) work
features_tested.details: Both 'Show Title' and 'Show Subtitle' checkboxes found and checked in the Section Display area

features_tested.feature: Admin panel Homepage > Trust section editor: Can add/remove metrics cards
features_tested.details: Add button found for Metrics Row. Trash icon visible on each card for removal.

features_tested.feature: Admin panel Homepage > Trust section editor: Can add/remove philosophy cards
features_tested.details: Add button found for Why Us Row. Trash icon visible on each card for removal.

features_tested.feature: Google stars indicator on Google Rating card
features_tested.details: 5 gold stars displayed below the 5.0 value in the Google Rating card
Visibility switch found on Trust section row with state=true (visible)
